AM.T: The name of the LORD is a strong tower; the righteous run to it and are safe.

PM.T: There is neither Jew nor Greek, slave nor free, male nor female, for you are all one in Christ Jesus.

AM.T: You shall have no other gods before Me.

PM.T: In the same way, let your light shine before men, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in heaven.

AM.T: For behold, I will create new heavens and a new earth. The former things will not be remembered, nor will they come to mind.

PM.T: Therefore take up the full armor of God, so that when the day of evil comes, you will be able to stand your ground, and having done everything, to stand.

AM.T: “Naked I came from my mother’s womb, and naked I will return. The LORD gave, and the LORD has taken away. Blessed be the name of the LORD.”

PM.T: Blessed is the man who perseveres under trial, because when he has stood the test, he will receive the crown of life that God has promised to those who love Him.

AM.T: “The LORD is my portion,” says my soul, “therefore I will hope in Him.”

PM.T: Draw near to God, and He will draw near to you. Cleanse your hands, you sinners, and purify your hearts, you double-minded.

AM.T: For in the day of trouble He will hide me in His shelter; He will conceal me under the cover of His tent; He will set me high upon a rock.

PM.T: And let us consider how to spur one another on to love and good deeds.

AM.T: Some trust in chariots and others in horses, but we trust in the name of the LORD our God.

PM.T: For even the Son of Man did not come to be served, but to serve, and to give His life as a ransom for many.”

AM.T: For the LORD is righteous; He loves justice. The upright will see His face.

PM.T: Do everything without complaining or arguing,

AM.T: When I am afraid, I put my trust in You.

PM.T: Who then overcomes the world? Only he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God.

AM.T: By wisdom a house is built and by understanding it is established; through knowledge its rooms are filled with every precious and beautiful treasure.

PM.T: Through Jesus, therefore, let us continually offer to God a sacrifice of praise, the fruit of lips that confess His name.

AM.T: the judgments of the LORD are true, being altogether righteous.

PM.T: So you also, when you have done everything commanded of you, should say, ‘We are unworthy servants; we have only done our duty.’”

AM.T: I have loved you with an everlasting love; therefore I have drawn you with loving devotion.

PM.T: Do not be afraid, little flock, for your Father is pleased to give you the kingdom.

AM.T: Know that the LORD is God. It is He who made us, and we are His; we are His people, and the sheep of His pasture.

PM.T: For the eyes of the Lord are on the righteous, and His ears are inclined to their prayer. But the face of the Lord is against those who do evil.”

AM.T: For in You I can charge an army; with my God I can scale a wall.

PM.T: For God has not called us to impurity, but to holiness.

AM.T: The LORD is a refuge for the oppressed, a stronghold in times of trouble.

PM.T: But love your enemies, do good to them, and lend to them, expecting nothing in return. Then your reward will be great, and you will be sons of the Most High; for He is kind to the ungrateful and wicked.

AM.T: I sought the LORD, and He answered me; He delivered me from all my fears.

PM.T: And we have come to know and believe the love that God has for us. God is love; whoever abides in love abides in God, and God in him.

AM.T: You know when I sit and when I rise; You understand my thoughts from afar.

PM.T: And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come back and welcome you into My presence, so that you also may be where I am.

AM.T: For then I will restore pure lips to the peoples, that all may call upon the name of the LORD and serve Him shoulder to shoulder.

PM.T: Do not be deceived: God is not to be mocked. Whatever a man sows, he will reap in return.

AM.T: Wait patiently for the LORD; be strong and courageous. Wait patiently for the LORD!

PM.T: Finally, all of you, be like-minded and sympathetic, love as brothers, be tenderhearted and humble.

AM.T: Sing to the LORD a new song, for He has done wonders; His right hand and holy arm have gained Him the victory.

PM.T: Who of you by worrying can add a single hour to his life?

AM.T: Oh, how I love Your law! All day long it is my meditation.

PM.T: Each of you should look not only to your own interests, but also to the interests of others.

AM.T: One gives freely, yet gains even more; another withholds what is right, only to become poor.

PM.T: for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God,

AM.T: There is an abundance of gold and rubies, but lips of knowledge are a rare treasure.

PM.T: What will it profit a man if he gains the whole world, yet forfeits his soul? Or what can a man give in exchange for his soul?

AM.T: the LORD does not see as man does. For man sees the outward appearance, but the LORD sees the heart.”

PM.T: If someone strikes you on one cheek, turn to him the other also. And if someone takes your cloak, do not withhold your tunic as well.

AM.T: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth; break forth — let your cry ring out, and sing praises!

PM.T: Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life. Whoever rejects the Son will not see life. Instead, the wrath of God remains on him.”

AM.T: My flesh and my heart may fail, but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever.

PM.T: If it is possible on your part, live at peace with everyone.

AM.T: Better a dish of vegetables where there is love than a fattened ox with hatred.

PM.T: He saved us, not by the righteous deeds we had done, but according to His mercy

AM.T: Your loving devotion, O LORD, reaches to the heavens, Your faithfulness to the clouds.

PM.T: Therefore, since you have been raised with Christ, strive for the things above, where Christ is seated at the right hand of God.

AM.T: As far as the east is from the west, so far has He removed our transgressions from us.

PM.T: Whoever tries to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life will preserve it.

AM.T: “For My thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways My ways,” declares the LORD.

PM.T: For the gospel reveals the righteousness of God that comes by faith from start to finish, just as it is written: “The righteous will live by faith.”
